title: MCP get_process_info real implementation
changes: Replaced hardcoded '127.0.0.1:0' address with: (1) address file read if present, (2) configured A2A listen address from a2a.toml, (3) default A2A address (127.0.0.1:8080)
Added write_address_file() helper for servers to record their bound address on startup
Added unit test: test_get_server_status_uses_real_pid_and_address asserts PID matches current process and address is not '127.0.0.1:0'
